project_type: TypeScript monorepo - 9 consumer apps + 26 shared packages, all placeholder/skeleton code
build_system: Currently npm workspaces with no real build. Converting to pnpm + Turborepo. NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared (NODE_OPTIONS="") before running pnpm due to a missing preload module in this environment.
test_framework: Currently none (scripts/test.js just counts files). Converting to Vitest.
build_command: NODE_OPTIONS="" pnpm turbo build (after Phase 0 setup)
test_command: NODE_OPTIONS="" pnpm turbo test (after Phase 0 setup)
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" pnpm install to install deps. 2. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" pnpm turbo lint typecheck test build to verify pipeline. 3. For Phase 1, verify Prisma schema generates successfully with NODE_OPTIONS="" npx prisma generate.
snapshot_or_generated_files: Prisma client will be generated at node_modules/.prisma/client. prisma/migrations/ directory will contain generated SQL migrations.
setup_instructions: 1. NODE_OPTIONS="" pnpm install. 2. For Phase 1 DB: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d (requires Docker). 3. NODE_OPTIONS="" npx prisma migrate dev.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network - can install from npm registries. Node.js v22.22.3 available. pnpm 10.28.1 available. Must use NODE_OPTIONS="" prefix for pnpm/node commands due to missing preload module. No Docker daemon available for container testing but docker-compose.dev.yml should be created for documentation and future use.
contribution_requirements: From steering file: Never use Math.random() for security. Never store data in Map<> outside request scope. Always validate input with Zod. Always use parameterized queries. Coverage gate >= 80% per package.
key_patterns: Current code uses class-based services, TypeScript interfaces for schemas in packages/database/src/schemas/, BaseModel with in-memory Map<string, T> store, custom Router class in each app's api/server.ts. 296 files have new Map( usage that needs replacement.
directory_structure: Root: package.json, tsconfig.json, scripts/test.js. apps/: 9 apps (quantads, quantai, quantchat, quantedits, quantmail, quantmax, quantneon, quantsync, quantube) each with api/ and src/ dirs. packages/: 26 packages (admin, ai, analytics, auth, common, database, data-pipeline, developer-platform, ecosystem-bridge, gaming, i18n, media, ml-pipeline, moderation, notifications, observability, payments, performance, realtime, recommendations, search, security, server, shared-ui, social-graph, testing). No .github/, no .gitignore, no CI/CD, no Docker files.
